message:
docs(README): clarify DataFrame output method count (br-qs9u / fd90.83)

Self-review surfaced another stale claim: README line 491 lead
said "17 output methods for different consumption contexts" but
the table beneath listed only 12 inline methods. The 17 figure
appears to have counted fp-io's DataFrameIoExt methods alongside
the inline ones, but those weren't in the table either - so 17
matched neither the inline-only count (12) nor the inline + IO
extension count (12 + 11 = 23).

Replace the misleading single number with an accurate split:
"12 inline output methods (plus 11 file / bytes writers via
DataFrameIoExt — to_parquet, to_parquet_bytes, to_csv_file,
to_json_file, to_excel_file, to_excel_bytes, to_jsonl_file,
to_feather_file, to_feather_bytes, to_sql, to_sql_with_options)".

Now users see the inline 12 in the table immediately below AND
know where to find the 11 file/bytes writers via the inline
link to fp-io's source.

Pure README change, no code impact. Build passes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -488,7 +488,7 @@ let row = df.xs("2024-01-15")?;
 
 ### DataFrame Output Formats
 
-17 output methods for different consumption contexts:
+12 inline output methods for different consumption contexts (plus 11 file / bytes writers via the [`DataFrameIoExt`](crates/fp-io/src/lib.rs) extension trait — `to_parquet`, `to_parquet_bytes`, `to_csv_file`, `to_json_file`, `to_excel_file`, `to_excel_bytes`, `to_jsonl_file`, `to_feather_file`, `to_feather_bytes`, `to_sql`, `to_sql_with_options`):
 
 | Method | pandas Equivalent | Format |
 |--------|-------------------|--------|
